title: Arrest And Trial
overview: Arrest and Trial is a 90-minute American crime/legal drama series that ran during the 1963-1964 season on ABC, airing Sundays from 8:30-10 p.m. Eastern.

episodes.title: Onward and Upward
episodes.overview: A sleazy corporate yes-man inherits the unpleasant task of corpse disposal after his boss murders his mistress.
